name: wow-faq-accordion
description: Frequently-asked-questions accordion built on native <details>/<summary> elements — zero JavaScript. Each question is a merchant-editable block with question text, answer textarea, and an open-by-default toggle. Three icon styles (plus/minus, arrow, none) implemented in pure CSS via ::before/::after pseudo-elements that rotate on details[open]. Smooth height animation uses the grid-template-rows: 0fr → 1fr trick for transition without JS height measurement. Optional dividers between items. Includes the full UI Element Settings Standard: §8.2 typography for heading/subheading/question/answer, §8.6 section background, §8.7 dividers, §8.8 layout (content position, content max width, accordion max width, items gap, items align, section width), §8.9 universal settings (hide on mobile/desktop, custom CSS). Standard 3-field animation respects prefers-reduced-motion. Keyboard navigation comes free from <summary>; focus-visible ring on each summary; section aria-label + role=list on the FAQ list.
